description: StackBlitz is an online development environment for frontend, Node.js, and JavaScript projects that runs in the browser. It also provides tooling for embedding and programmatically creating StackBlitz projects from websites and documentation.
summary: StackBlitz exposes a public browser integration surface via its npm-delivered JavaScript SDK and a public form-based HTTP POST API for creating/opening projects; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or authenticated developer API surface was found on stackblitz.com.
